chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1952 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 31.10.2024 Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh. ----- None present for the Petitioner. Matter pertains to Demarcation of Agricultural Land. This Court has already decided all these matters in its Judgment reported in SBLR 2021 Sindh 261. Petition is dismissed. Petitioner can avail the Remedy as per law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
